name: sgs/nav-menu
title: SGS Nav Menu
description: The site's primary navigation bar. A flat horizontal row of real links on desktop; below the collapse point it becomes a burger that opens the sgs/nav-drawer via the shared sgs/nav Interactivity store. Menu content comes from a native WordPress menu.

wrapper.label: Nav wrapper
wrapper._note: The rendered <nav> (SGS_Container_Wrapper, composite-mirror rule R-31-9). Padding/margin ride the native spacing support; max-width is the flat attribute. The 12 ARRANGEMENT members (layer OUTER) — display/flex-direction/align-items/justify-content etc. — are honest GAPs: style.css:13-17 hardcodes `display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between` with no attribute behind any of it. Not fixed here — out of this task's scope (only STATE_WITHOUT_BASE cases are fixed).

bar.label: Item bar (flex row)
bar._note: The <ul class="sgs-nav-menu__bar"> that actually arranges the item links — distinct from `wrapper`, which arranges the bar against the burger toggle-wrap. Remaining ARRANGEMENT members are honest GAPs (style.css:19-26 hardcodes `display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap` with no attribute).

item.label: Nav item (resting)
item._note: render.php:304-309 groups `:hover`, `:focus-visible` AND `[aria-current="page"]` into ONE selector list (`$hover_targets`) sharing the SAME itemColourHover/itemBgHover/itemRadiusHover attributes — so `selected` (the current-page indicator, view.js-computed) is declared with the identical attrMap as `hover`, not derived from the name (FR-35-5). underlineThickness/underlineOffset/underlineColour(Hover) belong to the separate `underline` element, not this one — they only apply under hoverStyle='underline'.

underline.label: Hover / current-page underline bar
underline._note: The ::after bar rendered only when hoverStyle='underline' (render.php:369-377). underlineThickness maps to css:height (the bar's own height, not the item's) and underlineOffset maps to css:bottom (its position:absolute offset) — both attrMap'd explicitly since neither matches the default {prefix}{suffix} convention for those members. `selected` reuses the same hover state (render.php's $hover_after_sel covers :hover/:focus-visible/[aria-current] identically), so no separate selected mapping is declared to avoid a duplicate finding.

featured.label: Featured item
featured._note: render.php:431-459. featuredFontWeightHover is a genuine hover-state weight change (only emitted when it differs from resting), declared under `text` cluster's css:font-weight member.

burger.label: Burger toggle
burger._note: burgerColour is the icon TEXT colour (css:color, render.php:466-469); burgerHoverColour drives the button's HOVER background-color (render.php:479-482, was 470-473 pre-fix), which previously had no resting counterpart — a client could style the hover fill but never the button's own resting fill (STATE_WITHOUT_BASE, Spec 35 FR-35-5). Fixed 2026-07-21 by adding the `burgerBg` base attribute + inspector control (edit.js Burger panel, Normal state) so css:background-color now resolves at base too. Unset burgerBg renders byte-identical to before (style.css:73-88 `background:none` default).
